003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.SystemUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
022
023/**
024 * Parent class for all classes that traverse POJOs.
025 *
026 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
027 * <p>
028 * Base class that serves as the parent class for all serializers and other classes that traverse POJOs.
029 *
030 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
031 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
032 * </ul>
033 *
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "rawtypes",
037   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_detectRecursions)
038})
039public abstract class MarshallingTraverseContext extends MarshallingContextable {
040
041   // Property name constants
042   private static final String PROP_detectRecursions = "detectRecursions";
043   private static final String PROP_ignoreRecursions = "ignoreRecursions";
044   private static final String PROP_initialDepth = "initialDepth";
045   private static final String PROP_maxDepth = "maxDepth";
046
047   /**
048    * Builder class.
049    */
050   @SuppressWarnings({
051      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
052   })
053   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends MarshallingContextable.Builder<SELF> {
054
055      private boolean detectRecursions;
056      private boolean ignoreRecursions;
057      private int initialDepth;
058      private int maxDepth;
059
060      /**
061       * Constructor, default settings.
062       */
063      protected Builder() {
064         detectRecursions = env("MarshallingTraverseContext.detectRecursions", false);
065         ignoreRecursions = env("MarshallingTraverseContext.ignoreRecursions", false);
066         initialDepth = env("MarshallingTraverseContext.initialDepth", 0);
067         maxDepth = env("MarshallingTraverseContext.maxDepth", 100);
068      }
069
070      /**
071       * Copy constructor.
072       *
073       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
074       */
075      protected Builder(MarshallingTraverseContext copyFrom) {
076         super(copyFrom);
077         detectRecursions = copyFrom.getDetectRecursions();
078         ignoreRecursions = copyFrom.getIgnoreRecursions();
079         initialDepth = copyFrom.getInitialDepth();
080         maxDepth = copyFrom.getMaxDepth();
081      }
082
083      /**
084       * Copy constructor.
085       *
086       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
087       */
088      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
089         super(copyFrom);
090         detectRecursions = copyFrom.detectRecursions;
091         ignoreRecursions = copyFrom.ignoreRecursions;
092         initialDepth = copyFrom.initialDepth;
093         maxDepth = copyFrom.maxDepth;
094      }
095
096      /**
097       * Automatically detect POJO recursions.
098       *
099       * <p>
100       * When enabled, specifies that recursions should be checked for during traversal.
101       *
102       * <p>
103       * Recursions can occur when traversing models that aren't true trees but rather contain loops.
104       * <br>In general, unchecked recursions cause stack-overflow-errors.
105       * <br>These show up as {@link MarshallingRecursionException MarshallingRecursionException} with the message <js>"Depth too deep.  Stack overflow occurred."</js>.
106       *
107       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
108       *    <li class='note'>
109       *       Checking for recursion can cause a small performance penalty.
110       * </ul>
111       *
112       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
113       * <p class='bjava'>
114       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that automatically checks for recursions.</jc>
115       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
116       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
117       *       .detectRecursions()
118       *       .build();
119       *
120       *    <jc>// Create a POJO model with a recursive loop.</jc>
121       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
122       *       <jk>public</jk> Object <jf>f</jf>;
123       *    }
124       *    MyBean <jv>bean</jv> = <jk>new</jk> MyBean();
125       *    <jv>bean</jv>.<jf>f</jf> = <jv>bean</jv>;
126       *
127       *    <jc>// Throws a SerializeException and not a StackOverflowError</jc>
128       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>bean</jv>);
129       * </p>
130       *
131       * @return This object.
132       */
133      public SELF detectRecursions() {
134         return detectRecursions(true);
135      }
136
137      /**
138       * Same as {@link #detectRecursions()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
139       *
140       * @param value The value for this setting.
141       * @return This object.
142       */
143      public SELF detectRecursions(boolean value) {
144         detectRecursions = value;
145         return self();
146      }
147
148      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
149      public HashKey hashKey() {
150         // @formatter:off
151         return HashKey.of(
152            super.hashKey(),
153            detectRecursions,
154            ignoreRecursions,
155            initialDepth,
156            maxDepth
157         );
158         // @formatter:on
159      }
160
161      /**
162       * Ignore recursion errors.
163       *
164       * <p>
165       * When enabled, when we encounter the same object when traversing a tree, we set the value to <jk>null</jk>.
166       *
167       * <p>
168       * For example, if a model contains the links A-&gt;B-&gt;C-&gt;A, then the JSON generated will look like
169       *    the following when this setting is <jk>true</jk>...
170       *
171       * <p class='bjson'>
172       *    {A:{B:{C:<jk>null</jk>}}}
173       * </p>
174       *
175       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
176       *    <li class='note'>
177       *       Checking for recursion can cause a small performance penalty.
178       * </ul>
179       *
180       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
181       * <p class='bjava'>
182       *    <jc>// Create a serializer ignores recursions.</jc>
183       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
184       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
185       *       .ignoreRecursions()
186       *       .build();
187       *
188       *    <jc>// Create a POJO model with a recursive loop.</jc>
189       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
190       *       <jk>public</jk> Object <jf>f</jf>;
191       *    }
192       *    MyBean <jv>bean</jv> = <jk>new</jk> MyBean();
193       *    <jv>bean</jv>.<jf>f</jf> = <jv>bean</jv>;
194       *
195       *    <jc>// Produces "{f:null}"</jc>
196       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>bean</jv>);
197       * </p>
198       *
199       * @return This object.
200       */
201      public SELF ignoreRecursions() {
202         return ignoreRecursions(true);
203      }
204
205      /**
206       * Same as {@link #ignoreRecursions()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
207       *
208       * @param value The value for this setting.
209       * @return This object.
210       */
211      public SELF ignoreRecursions(boolean value) {
212         ignoreRecursions = value;
213         return self();
214      }
215
216      /**
217       * Initial depth.
218       *
219       * <p>
220       * The initial indentation level at the root.
221       *
222       * <p>
223       * Useful when constructing document fragments that need to be indented at a certain level when whitespace is enabled.
224       *
225       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
226       * <p class='bjava'>
227       *    <jc>// Create a serializer with whitespace enabled and an initial depth of 2.</jc>
228       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
229       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
230       *       .ws()
231       *       .initialDepth(2)
232       *       .build();
233       *
234       *    <jc>// Produces "\t\t{\n\t\t\t'foo':'bar'\n\t\t}\n"</jc>
235       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
236       * </p>
237       *
238       * @param value
239       *    The new value for this setting.
240       *    <br>The default is <c>0</c>.
241       * @return This object.
242       */
243      public SELF initialDepth(int value) {
244         initialDepth = value;
245         return self();
246      }
247
248      /**
249       * Max traversal depth.
250       *
251       * <p>
252       * When enabled, abort traversal if specified depth is reached in the POJO tree.
253       *
254       * <p>
255       * If this depth is exceeded, an exception is thrown.
256       *
257       * <p>
258       * This prevents stack overflows from occurring when trying to traverse models with recursive references.
259       *
260       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
261       * <p class='bjava'>
262       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that throws an exception if the depth reaches greater than 20.</jc>
263       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
264       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
265       *       .maxDepth(20)
266       *       .build();
267       * </p>
268       *
269       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
270       *    <li class='jm'>{@link Builder#maxDepth(int)}
271       * </ul>
272       *
273       * @param value
274       *    The new value for this setting.
275       *    <br>The default is <c>100</c>.
276       * @return This object.
277       */
278      public SELF maxDepth(int value) {
279         maxDepth = value;
280         return self();
281      }
282
283
284   }
285
286   private final boolean detectRecursions;
287   private final boolean ignoreRecursions;
288   private final int initialDepth;
289   private final int maxDepth;
290   private final boolean actualDetectRecursions;
291
292   /**
293    * Constructor
294    *
295    * @param builder The builder for this object.
296    */
297   protected MarshallingTraverseContext(Builder builder) {
298      super(builder);
299
300      detectRecursions = builder.detectRecursions;
301      ignoreRecursions = builder.ignoreRecursions;
302      initialDepth = builder.initialDepth;
303      maxDepth = builder.maxDepth;
304
305      actualDetectRecursions = detectRecursions || ignoreRecursions || super.isDebug();
306   }
307
308   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
309   public abstract Builder<?> copy();
310
311   /**
312    * Initial depth.
313    *
314    * @see Builder#initialDepth(int)
315    * @return
316    *    The initial indentation level at the root.
317    */
318   public final int getInitialDepth() { return initialDepth; }
319
320   /**
321    * Max traversal depth.
322    *
323    * @see Builder#maxDepth(int)
324    * @return
325    *    The depth at which traversal is aborted if depth is reached in the POJO tree.
326    * <br>If this depth is exceeded, an exception is thrown.
327    */
328   public final int getMaxDepth() { return maxDepth; }
329
330   /**
331    * Automatically detect POJO recursions.
332    *
333    * @see Builder#detectRecursions()
334    * @return
335    *    <jk>true</jk> if recursions should be checked for during traversal.
336    */
337   public final boolean isDetectRecursions() { return detectRecursions; }
338
339   /**
340    * Whether recursion detection is effectively enabled during traversal.
341    * This is {@link #isDetectRecursions()} OR {@link #isIgnoreRecursions()} OR {@link #isDebug()}.
342    */
343   protected final boolean shouldDetectRecursions() { return actualDetectRecursions; }
344
345   /**
346    * Ignore recursion errors.
347    *
348    * @see Builder#ignoreRecursions()
349    * @return
350    *    <jk>true</jk> if when we encounter the same object when traversing a tree, we set the value to <jk>null</jk>.
351    *    <br>Otherwise, an exception is thrown with the message <js>"Recursion occurred, stack=..."</js>.
352    */
353   public final boolean isIgnoreRecursions() { return ignoreRecursions; }
354
355   /**
356    * Detect recursions flag (raw value).
357    *
358    * @return The detect recursions flag.
359    */
360   protected final boolean getDetectRecursions() { return detectRecursions; }
361
362   /**
363    * Ignore recursions flag (raw value).
364    *
365    * @return The ignore recursions flag.
366    */
367   protected final boolean getIgnoreRecursions() { return ignoreRecursions; }
368
369   @Override /* Overridden from MarshallingContextable */
370   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
371      return super.properties()
372         .a(PROP_detectRecursions, detectRecursions)
373         .a(PROP_ignoreRecursions, ignoreRecursions)
374         .a(PROP_initialDepth, initialDepth)
375         .a(PROP_maxDepth, maxDepth);
376   }
377}
